历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for science (physics category) was approximately 9156 → 9960 → 15192 → 12241 → 13425, showing a fluctuating and backward trend overall. In 2023, due to the first adjustment of new college entrance examination subject selection, there was a significant backward shift to 15192, rebounding to 12241 in 2024, and then moving back to 13425 in 2025. The average over the past three years is about 13619, with the 2025 baseline around 13425. The enrollment plan for this university in Shanxi science (physics category) was 49 in 2021, 12 in 2022, 13 in 2023, 10 in 2024, and 6 in 2025, showing a continuous reduction trend. The 2026 plan is 8, an increase of 2 (33%) compared to 2025, which is a relatively large expansion and helps alleviate competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; Soft Science main ranking approximately 63rd in 2026, with steady improvement in recent years (71st in 2021 to 63rd in 2026), indicating continuously enhancing comprehensive strength. During the 2024 college entrance examination cycle, negative public opinion regarding teacher ethics (associate professor reported for sexual harassment) had some inhibitory effect on application psychology. However, Douyin (TikTok) popularity total ranking 15th (high heat), with large exposure on short video platforms, and positive content such as handwritten admission letters widely disseminated, overall attention is relatively high. Chinese Language and Literature A-, Psychology A-, Education A-, three disciplines rated A-, showing outstanding disciplinary strength among normal universities, attracting applications for related majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of normal/education majors peaked in 2022 and has been cooling down since (differentiation and wait-and-see in 2023 and 2024), with overall application heat becoming more rational. Computer science, electronic information/communication and other engineering majors continue to be highly recommended, diverting science candidates significantly. In 2026, the number of physics category candidates in Shanxi Province is approximately 167,419, a decrease of about 5,928 (3.4%) compared to 2025, slightly easing competition. Shaanxi Normal University is located in Xi'an, a neighboring province, which has natural geographical appeal for Shanxi candidates. The university's enrollment scale in Shanxi is small (only 8 in physics category in 2026), and small enrollment numbers easily cause ranking fluctuations.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 13425, 33% enrollment expansion in 2026, 3.4% decrease in local physics candidates, rising Soft Science ranking, high Douyin attention, and cooling popularity of normal majors, the expansion's effect on ranking backward shift is most significant, but the decrease in candidates and cooling popularity partially offset it. It is predicted that the minimum ranking for science in 2026 will be approximately 16010, with a range of 15510–16510.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Mathematics (including Mathematics and Applied Mathematics Normal, Guojun Class, Information and Computing Science, Statistics)
- Computer Science (new in 2026, including Software Engineering, Computer Science and Technology Hongmeng Class, Artificial Intelligence New Engineering Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Chemistry (new in 2026, including Chemistry Normal, Duxue Class, Innovation Experimental Class, Applied Chemistry)
- Physics (enrolled from 2021-2024, not listed for 2025-2026, refer to historical data).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Psychology (including Psychology Zeru Top-notch Base Class, Applied Psychology)
- Materials (including Materials Chemistry, New Energy Materials and Devices).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking for science in 2026 is approximately 16010, with a range of 15510–16510. Candidates within this range are advised to focus on Tier 2 majors as main targets, sprint for Tier 1 majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. Candidates significantly better than the lower bound (e.g., within 15500) can focus on sprinting for popular majors like Mathematics and Computer Science. Candidates near the upper bound (around 16500) should prioritize Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts (history category) was approximately 1448 → 1227 → 1467 → 1609 → 1501, fluctuating narrowly within the 1200–1600 range with no clear unilateral trend; the 2025 baseline is about 1501. The university's enrollment plan for liberal arts (history category) in Shanxi was 29 in 2021, 13 in 2022, 14 in 2023, 14 in 2024, and 6 in 2025, with a significant reduction in recent years; the 2026 plan is 6, unchanged from 2025, indicating stability. It is a Project 211 and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 63rd in the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, with a steady upward trend in recent years, reflecting continuously enhanced comprehensive strength.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: During the 2024 college entrance examination cycle, negative public opinion regarding teacher ethics (an associate professor was reported for sexual harassment) had a certain inhibitory effect on application psychology; Douyin popularity ranked 15th overall (high heat), with positive content such as handwritten admission letters widely disseminated, resulting in relatively high overall attention; Chinese Language and Literature A-, Psychology A-, Education A-, among which Chinese Language and Literature directly corresponds to the liberal arts enrollment major (Chinese Language and Literature Category), strongly attracting candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of teacher training/education majors peaked in 2022 and has since continued to cool, assessed as 'differentiated wait-and-see' in 2024, with applications becoming more rational; Chinese Language/Literature majors were assessed as 'recommended' in 2023–2024, slightly hot, strongly attracting liberal arts candidates; Journalism and Communication Category was assessed as 'clearly discouraged' in 2023, with low popularity; in 2026, the number of history category candidates in Shanxi is approximately 63,113, a significant decrease of about 21,766 (25.6%) compared to 2025, greatly easing competition; Shaanxi Normal University is located in neighboring Xi'an, which naturally attracts Shanxi candidates; the university's enrollment scale for liberal arts in Shanxi is extremely small (only 6 in 2026), and the small number of enrollments can easily cause ranking fluctuations.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1501, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, the significant 25.6% reduction in local history category candidates, the rise in the university's Soft Science ranking, high Douyin attention, and the cooling of teacher training major popularity, the sharp decrease in candidate numbers is the most critical factor driving the ranking forward (numerical decrease), while the unchanged plan and high attention partially offset this; it is predicted that the 2026 minimum ranking for liberal arts will be approximately 1421, with a range of 1065–1777.
